title: Wave 19 - Manager provider handoff and assignment parity
description: Coordinate Wave 19 to replace static manager->provider handoff states with real candidate discovery and assignment operations aligned with CRM behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 19 tickets are defined for architect/backend/mobile/qa with dependency order
Execution plan includes PR/Jira traceability and rollback checkpoints for provider assignment flow
Risk log covers stale UI state, role guard regressions, and candidate list consistency
